value.found_quote: In AntiGravity user settings i have enabled everywhere, where its possible that the model auto proceeds. My deny list is also empty. My problem is, it still asks for input on my side.
value.rationale: The page is a Google AI Developers Forum thread about Google Antigravity, describing user policy/permission settings (deny list, "Always run"/"Always Proceed" auto-execution, browser and tmp permissions) that govern when the model auto-proceeds versus asking for input. These are guardrail-style policy settings within Antigravity, substantiating that Google's Antigravity offers such controls. The thread describes them as existing features (with bugs), indicating active status.
